title: boechera tenuis
intro: Boechera tenuis, also known as rock cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Boechera tenuis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Boechera tenuis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
